findings.quote: Read only the fuel line, and the greenest furnace is the fullest one. Read the reject bin too, and it is not.
findings.note: register/rhythm: the same antithetical-kicker cadence ('Read X... Read Y...'; 'not how full... it is how clean') recurs 3-4x, giving a faintly over-shaped, manufactured feel next to the more varied exposition of ELF-long exemplar host-2021-verb2-ELF-040 (Pantheon). Genre (real popular-science feature on glass recycling), concrete density (soda ash, Marholm works, ~3% per tenth of cullet, ~60% threshold, named source Rasmus Feld with direct quote) and question style (main-idea/detail/inference/attitude, paraphrase-register options) are otherwise fully authentic. Edge-of-range, not disqualifying; adjudication decides. Exemplars read: host-2021-verb2-ELF-040, host-ver2-2019-verb1-ELF-031, var-2022-1-verb1-ELF-031.
